title: Jothe Jotheyali
overview: Nakul and Divya, heading for divorce. Through flashbacks, we see their love story, marriage, and struggles.  Misunderstandings and neglect lead to separation. After the divorce, Nakul dies saving Divya from a criminal, making her realize his true love.
